ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the document */,
  "jira_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the JIRA issue ID associated with the document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the document */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the document */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the document in bytes */,
  "google_drive_id" TEXT /* ID of the document in Google Drive */,
  "drupal_id" TEXT /* ID of the document in Drupal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_doc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("doc_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_jira_id FOREIGN KEY ("jira_id") REFERENCES jira_issues ("jira_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES document_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "doc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "doc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of this version */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the version */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the version in bytes */,
  "changes_made_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES document_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document this link belongs to */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., Google Drive, Drupal) */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_links_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the comment belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., general, task, approval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the task is related to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user the task is assigned to */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "task_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "task_status_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jira_issues" (
  "jira_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JIRA issue */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the JIRA issue is related to */,
  "jira_key" TEXT /* JIRA issue key (e.g., PROJECT-123) */,
  "jira_url" TEXT /* URL of the JIRA issue */,
  "jira_status" TEXT /* Status of the JIRA issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "jira_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the JIRA issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "jira_labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the JIRA issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jira_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jira_issues_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the document */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was accessed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the document (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the document */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was approved */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the approver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approvals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approvals_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the event (e.g., changes made, files uploaded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "related_doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related document */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_related_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
